title: WHISPER/SEALED_WHISPER accept phantom recipient pub_ids, polluting offline queue
description: ws.rs WHISPER (~line 1093) and SEALED_WHISPER (~line 1165): the recipient pub_id is validated as 64 lowercase hex chars but is NOT checked against user_exists(). An authenticated client can address whispers to any hex string that is not in the users table. deliver_live() returns false, so enqueue() is called. The offline_messages table has no FK to users; the per-recipient cap (1000) limits growth per fake target but there are 2^256 valid pub_id values, allowing unbounded table growth across many fake recipients. Fix: call user_exists() on params.to before routing, same as GROUP_ADD does for member_pub_id.
